g.text: Skyvern ships the tier-1 thesis; the gap is verification
read this before planning any reuse work - we are late to this tier, and say so
we do not design for this yet
THE GAP - the only one that matters
nobody proves the replay was right
retreat rule: if measurement shows their fallback catches outcome errors as well as our gate does,
the verification wedge is gone - that is a benchmark (B5/T5), not an argument
caveat: read from public docs and a commit title, not their source; a fixed bug is fixed - the architectural stance is what is cited
